calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Providing Bond
Off Calendar Mar-10-2020 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Confirming Eugene Covey As Successor Trustee To Serve Without Bond
Off Calendar Feb-18-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Elizabeth Hansen for Petitioner, Eugene Covey.

The Court inquired as to the waiver of bond being signed by the attorney in fact. Ms. Hansen read article 2.16, stated that she got the bond premium estimate and wanted to see if bond could be waived. The Court noted that it was not convinced that clause waives the bond.

The Court granted the petition for order confirming Eugene Covey as Successor Trustee (subject to review and modification of the order), to require bond at 1,500,000.00.

Status on providing bond is set for March 10, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.
